title: Anti-Pattern Detection (Browser Build)
description: Browser-adapted IIFE anti-pattern detector. Guards with typeof window check. Exposed API: window.impeccableScan(). Supports standalone and Chrome-extension (EXTENSION_MODE) operation. Generated from detect-antipatterns.mjs via build-browser-detector.js.

modules.name: Constants
fields: QUALITY_TEXT_TAGS: Set<string>  // p, li, td, th, dd, blockquote, figcaption
LAYOUT_TRANSITION_PROPS: Set<string>  // width, height, padding, margin, etc.

modules.name: Finding
fields: el?: HTMLElement  // only in layout findings

function_groups.name: PureDetection
function_groups.note: Shared between browser and Node paths — receive pre-extracted plain values, no DOM access
methods: checkBorders(tag, widths: Record<Side,number>, colors: Record<Side,string>, radius: number): Finding[]
checkColors(opts: {tag, textColor, bgColor, effectiveBg, effectiveBgStops, fontSize, fontWeight, hasDirectText, isEmojiOnly, bgClip, bgImage, classList}): Finding[]

checkIconTile(opts: {headingTag, headingText, headingTop, siblingTag, siblingWidth, siblingHeight, siblingBottom, siblingBgColor, siblingBgImage, siblingBorderWidth, siblingBorderRadius, hasIconChild, iconChildWidth}): Finding[]
checkMotion(opts: {tag, transitionProperty, animationName, timingFunctions, classList}): Finding[]
checkHtmlPatterns(html: string): Finding[]  // regex-on-HTML; shared browser+Node
checkQuality(opts: {el, tag, style, hasDirectText, textLen, fontSize, lineHeightPx, letterSpacingPx, rect, lineMax}): Finding[]

function_groups.name: BackgroundResolution
function_groups.note: Walk parent chain; return null when gradient (no single solid color)
methods: resolveFontSizePx(el: Element, win?): number  // resolves em/rem/% by walking parents
resolveLengthPx(value: string, fontSizePx: number): number | null

function_groups.name: BrowserDOMAdapters
function_groups.note: Extract values from live DOM via getComputedStyle/getBoundingClientRect, then call pure fns
methods: checkElementGlowDOM(el): Finding[]  // resolves gradient parent bg
checkElementAIPaletteDOM(el): Finding[]  // gradient + neon text checks

function_groups.name: NodeAdapters
function_groups.note: Receive pre-extracted jsdom computed style; pass rect:null to skip layout-dependent rules
methods: checkElementBorders(tag, style, overrides): Finding[]  // jsdom var() workaround
checkElementIconTile(el, tag, window): Finding[]  // reads explicit px dims (no layout)

function_groups.name: BrowserPageChecks
methods: checkTypography(): Finding[]  // fontUsage Map, overused-font + single-font + flat-type-hierarchy
checkLayout(): Finding[]  // nested-cards detection via flaggedEls Set

function_groups.name: NodePageChecks
function_groups.note: Take doc, win params; used by Node engine

internal_state: TYPE_LABELS: Record<string, string>  // id → display name
ui_functions: updateSpotlightClipPath(): void  // SVG path(evenodd) cut-out via getBoundingClientRect
highlight(el, findings): void  // creates div.impeccable-overlay + div.impeccable-label; cycle nav for multi-finding
showPageBanner(findings): void  // fixed top banner div.impeccable-banner with scroll area + controls
generateSelector(el): string  // walks up to 10 levels, anchors on #id

flow: 1. Remove & clear all overlays[], disconnect visibilityObserver
b. Run all 7 checkElement*DOM() calls → collect findings
d. If findings.length > 0: call highlight(el, findings)
4. checkLayout() → per-element overlays or merge with existing; pageLevelFindings

key_relationships: scan() depends_on BrowserDOMAdapters (7 checkElement*DOM calls per element)
BrowserDOMAdapters depends_on PureDetection (delegates after extracting computed styles)
PureDetection depends_on ColorUtilities (parseRgb, isNeutralColor, relativeLuminance, etc.)
NodeAdapters and BrowserDOMAdapters both_delegate_to PureDetection (same pure functions)
important_notes: Entire file is an IIFE; exits immediately if typeof window === 'undefined'
IS_BROWSER=true hardcoded; IS_NODE=false — Node path code present but dead in this build
Node adapter functions (checkElement*, checkPage*) included but never called — browser build shares source with mjs
EXTENSION_MODE disables auto-scan; listens for postMessage commands instead
ResizeObserver on document.body + scroll/resize events keep overlay positions current
CSS for overlays injected via dynamic <style> tag (impeccable-reveal keyframe, hover states)
Spotlight uses SVG path(evenodd) clip-path for a cut-out reveal effect

getBoundingClientRect used in: checkElementBordersDOM, checkElementColorsDOM, checkElementIconTileDOM, checkElementQualityDOM, positionOverlay, updateSpotlightClipPath, isInViewport, serializeFindings
findings deduplication: layout findings merged into existing overlay when same element already flagged
